Football : Coupe de France
programme.desc: L'affiche des quarts de finale oppose l'Olympique Lyonnais au RC Lens. programme.title: beIN STORY
programme.desc: Inédit. beIN STORY est un rendez-vous documentaire, de 70 à 90 minutes, revenant sur un moment clé de l'histoire du sport ou sur une légende des stades. L'émission est présentée par le ou la journaliste et l'un(e) des consultant(e)s du sport concerné. Evènement imprévu, athlète au destin tragique ou moment crucial qui a changé pour toujours une discipline sportive, beIN STORY présente de grands do

programme.title: Live SPFL
programme.desc: Aberdeen v Celtic (Kick-off 8.00pm). Coverage of the Scottish Premiership match from Pittodrie. Celtic have won both meetings against Aberdeen this season including a 2-0 victory at this ground back in August. A goal in both halves from Benjamin Nygren and Reo Hatate gave the visitors a comfortable win in that match, while the most recent meeting at Celtic Park in December saw Celtic win 3-1.

programme.title: 1983: When Aberdeen Ruled Europe

programme.title: PL REWIND
programme.desc: Gianfranco Zola signed for Chelsea in November 1996, aged 30. The Little Magician became a trailblazer as one of the Premier League's first genuine flair players, and by the time of his departure seven seasons later, he had established himself as an all-time great at Stamford Bridge.

programme.title: THE BIG INTERVIEW
programme.desc: This week's Big Interview sees two of Chelsea's biggest stars from different generations come together for a football masterclass. Considered one of the most technically gifted players the Premier League has ever seen, Gianfranco Zola visits the Chelsea training ground to talk to the man currently lighting up the Premier League, Cole Palmer, about various aspects of his game.
